title: Padded Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with lentils, padded, and syrian meat. Perfect for a cold winter day.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the padded and Syrian and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the lentils, carrots, potatoes, and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
Add 4 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
